user_prompt: Help me a cooling the warp drive
prayer:
Approach the warp drive with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's chill upon its seething core.

Monitor auspex readings as frost-rimed incense purifies overheated plasma flows.
Proclaim the warp drive's thermal sanctity restored in the name of the Machine God.

Seal the rite with the Oath of Lethal Accuracy to the Omnissiah.
